data.content: The project uses **MSTest v3.8.0** with the new Microsoft Testing Platform enabled (`TestingPlatformDotnetTestSupport`). Tests are categorized via `[TestCategory]`. Let me run just the integration tests.

toolRequests.name: bash

arguments.description: Run integration tests with MSTest category filter

toolRequests.intentionSummary: Run integration tests with MSTest category filter

data.reasoningText:
The project uses **MSTest** (v3.8.0) with Microsoft Testing Platform (`TestingPlatformDotnetTestSupport` is set to `true` in Directory.Build.props). The tests have `TestCategory` attributes — the user wants only the "Integration" category.

Let me run the integration tests using `dotnet test` with a filter for the Integration category.

arguments.description: Run integration tests with MSTest category filter

toolCalls.name: bash
toolCalls.args: {"command": "cd /tmp/sv-2fbb0c9ff9a345f0b630e3a39473b855 && dotnet test --filter \"TestCategory=Integration\" 2>&1", "description": "Run integration tests with MSTest category filter", "initial_wait": 60}

toolArgs.description: Run integration tests with MSTest category filter
